name: !Fri3d Friends
short_description: Animated nametag + BLE proximity finder + contact swap
long_description: Shows your name and your group(s), and quietly alerts you when someone sharing one of your groups comes within Bluetooth range. Nearby friends appear as cards with signal strength. Press Y to swap contact info with another badge nearby (they press Y too). Configure your name, groups and free-form contact fields over an on-badge WiFi web portal (PIN-protected). Generic: any group sets its own name(s) and member by editing config.json.
